'''mayaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oildom|oildom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oildom|oildom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mayaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyæhæth|mæyæhæth]] || [[word:mæyæhæj|mæyæhæj]] || [[word:mæyæhæsh|mæyæhæsh]] || [[word:mæyæhæ|mæyæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayayahath|mayayahath]] || [[word:mayayahaj|mayayahaj]] || [[word:mayayahash|mayayahash]] || [[word:mayayaha|mayayaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayahath|mayahath]] || [[word:mayahaj|mayahaj]] || [[word:mayahash|mayahash]] || [[word:mayaha|mayaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayafhath|mayafhath]] || [[word:mayafhaj|mayafhaj]] || [[word:mayafhash|mayafhash]] || [[word:mayafhaf|mayafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayahatha|mayahatha]] || [[word:mayahaja|mayahaja]] || [[word:mayahasha|mayahasha]] || [[word:mayahaka|mayahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayahath|mayahath]] || [[word:mayahaj|mayahaj]] || [[word:mayahash|mayahash]] || [[word:mayaha|mayaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayahathal|mayahathal]] || [[word:mayahajal|mayahajal]] || [[word:mayahashal|mayahashal]] || [[word:mayahakal|mayahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayahathatha|mayahathatha]] || [[word:mayahajaja|mayahajaja]] || [[word:mayahashasha|mayahashasha]] || [[word:mayahaka|mayahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayahathan|mayahathan]] || [[word:mayahajan|mayahajan]] || [[word:mayahashan|mayahashan]] || [[word:mayahakan|mayahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayahathaoro|mayahathaoro]] || [[word:mayahajaoro|mayahajaoro]] || [[word:mayahashaoro|mayahashaoro]] || [[word:mayahakaoro|mayahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
